calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: David Yang; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, represented by attorney, Marina R. Franco, Esq., with settlement authority, is present.

Defendant Chongye Sun (sued as Chogye Sun) is present. Defendant Yong Luo is not present.
Attorney, Ming Chung, Esq., representing the defendant Chongye Sun through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Per JPT Yang, the parties have reached a settlement agreement, which was NOT FILED.

This case did settle. The trial date of SEP-08-2009 is vacated.
